# Cue

> Image-first desktop design workstation with reproducible local/native runtime paths. Public launch support is macOS-first (Tauri), with Windows and Linux still documented as roadmap targets.

## Overview

- Expanded agent context: [`llms-full.txt`](llms-full.txt)
- Canonical repo conventions: [`AGENTS.md`](AGENTS.md)
- Public docs index: [`docs/README.md`](docs/README.md)
- Practical task routing: [`docs/agent_quickstart.md`](docs/agent_quickstart.md)

## Agent Intake (Preferred)

- Intake contract and endpoint: [`agent-intake.json`](agent-intake.json)
- AIP schema: [`docs/aip-1.schema.json`](docs/aip-1.schema.json)
- Intake health/fallback cue: [`docs/agent_intake_status.md`](docs/agent_intake_status.md)
- Compact intake roundtrip example: [`docs/agent_intake_roundtrip.sample.json`](docs/agent_intake_roundtrip.sample.json)
- If `intake_endpoint` is reachable, POST an intake request to get curated `entrypoints`, optional `packs`, and `suggested_tags`.
- If intake is unavailable, fall back to the local docs and source entrypoints below.

## Start Here (No Network Needed)

- [`README.md`](README.md): user-facing quickstart, build notes, and release status
- [`AGENTS.md`](AGENTS.md): repository workflow, worktree rules, build/test status
- [`docs/desktop.md`](docs/desktop.md): current desktop behavior, run artifacts, and shell/runtime layout
- [`docs/agent-runtime.md`](docs/agent-runtime.md): agent-facing runtime model
- [`docs/local-magic-select-runtime.md`](docs/local-magic-select-runtime.md): prepared-runtime contract for local Magic Select

## High-Signal Code Entrypoints

- Rust engine CLI routing: [`rust_engine/crates/brood-cli/src/main.rs`](rust_engine/crates/brood-cli/src/main.rs)
- Rust engine orchestration: [`rust_engine/crates/brood-engine/src/lib.rs`](rust_engine/crates/brood-engine/src/lib.rs)
- Rust contracts/events: [`rust_engine/crates/brood-contracts/src/events.rs`](rust_engine/crates/brood-contracts/src/events.rs)
- Desktop UI and canvas runtime: [`desktop/src/canvas_app.js`](desktop/src/canvas_app.js)
- Desktop shell bootstrap: [`desktop/src/index.html`](desktop/src/index.html)
- Tauri backend and filesystem scope: [`desktop/src-tauri/src/main.rs`](desktop/src-tauri/src/main.rs), [`desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json`](desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json)
- Release/build automation: [`scripts/release_check.sh`](scripts/release_check.sh), [`scripts/stage_rust_engine_binary.sh`](scripts/stage_rust_engine_binary.sh)

## Task Routing

- Desktop shell, tabs, and canvas behavior: [`desktop/src/canvas_app.js`](desktop/src/canvas_app.js), [`desktop/src/index.html`](desktop/src/index.html), [`desktop/src/styles.css`](desktop/src/styles.css)
- Native runtime, providers, and env handling: [`rust_engine/crates/brood-engine/src/lib.rs`](rust_engine/crates/brood-engine/src/lib.rs), [`desktop/src-tauri/src/main.rs`](desktop/src-tauri/src/main.rs), [`.env.example`](.env.example)
- Run artifacts and `events.jsonl`: [`rust_engine/crates/brood-contracts/src/events.rs`](rust_engine/crates/brood-contracts/src/events.rs), [`docs/desktop.md`](docs/desktop.md)
- Release and packaging: [`RELEASING.md`](RELEASING.md), [`scripts/release_check.sh`](scripts/release_check.sh), [`desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json`](desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json)
- Legacy identifiers that should not be renamed casually: [`docs/legacy-internals.md`](docs/legacy-internals.md)

## Safe Commands

- `./scripts/dev_desktop.sh`
- `cd desktop && npm test`
- `cd desktop && npm run build`
- `cd desktop/src-tauri && cargo check`
- `cd rust_engine && cargo check`
- `./scripts/release_check.sh`

## Notes

- Public configuration should prefer `CUE_*` variables first; `BROOD_*` aliases remain only as documented compatibility fallbacks.
- Desktop runtime is native-only and packages the legacy internal engine resource `brood-rs`.
- Multi-agent rule: one feature per git worktree. Do not run concurrent agents in the same worktree or branch.
- Do not commit secrets; use `.env` (gitignored) based on [`.env.example`](.env.example).
